title: しっかりお掴まりくださ～い☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right, you guys are next! Make sure to hold
onto my arms tightly!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here we gooo! Giant Spinning Wheeeel! ☆

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! Hahaha! We're going so fast! I'm getting
dizzyyy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aaand done! So, how was it? Did you all have
fun?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That was so, so, SO fun! It's so awesome
how you can just swing us around like that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Knowing you enjoyed yourselves makes
me feel buono, buono, too!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Can I get my friends and my brother to come play
too? I want to spin with them!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Go ahead! I'll spin all of you round and round! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is so absorbed in playing with the
children that she completely forgets about
training.
